# sparkle-appcast Action

The sparkle-appcast action generates Sparkle Appcasts for full updates and delta updates with a provided OBS Studio disk image.

## Documentation

### Inputs

| Input | Description | Default |
|:-----:|-------------|---------|
| `architecture` | The CPU architecture to generate Appcast files for. See Notes. | `REQUIRED` |
| `channel` | The update channel to generate Appcast files for. See Notes. | `stable` |
| `signing-key` | The private key used for signing the generated delta update files. | `REQUIRED` |
| `num-deltas` | The amount of versions for which to generate delta update files for. | `3` |
| `rollout-interval` | The timeout in seconds for phased rollouts. | `86400` |
| `custom-title` | A custom title string to use for generated release notes. | `''` |
| `custom-link` | A custom project URL to use for generated release notes. | `''` |
| `working-directory` | A path to an OBS Studio checkout. | `github.workspace` |

### Outputs

| Output | Description |
|:------:|-------------|
| `artifact-prefix` | A string representing the prefix of build artifacts generated by the action. |

## Common Usage

```yaml
  - uses: ./.github/actions/sparkle-appcast
    with:
      baseImage: ${{ format('{0}/your-app-arm64-*', runner.temp) }}
      channel: stable
      numDeltas: 5
      customLink: 'https://<your-host>.com/'
      customTitle: 'Your App'
      signingKey: ${{ secrets.sparkle_key }}
      urlPrefix: 'https://cdn.<your-cdn-host/sparkle'
```

The action will automatically detect the feed URL and download the specified amount of previous versions to generate the required patch files and upload them as artifacts to the current actions run.

## Notes

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The action requires a macOS GitHub Actions runner.

* If `baseImage` is a glob expression yielding multiple possible files, the action will use the most recently modified file.
* The action either requires an `obs-studio` checkout in the default working directory or an alternative checkout location specified as the `workingDirectory` parameter.
* Available `architecture` values are `arm64` or `x86_64`, representing Apple Silicon-based and Intel-based Macs.
* Available `channel` values are `stable` or `betaﾂｴ.

## Developer Notes

* The action will create its own temporary working directory in the directory specified by `runner.temp`.
* The Sparkle download URL and checksum are extracted from the `CMakePresets.json` file in the project root.
* The base image can be any OBS Studio macOS disk image present on the GitHub Actions runner's disk.
* Appcast generation can take a while and depends on the performance of the provided GitHub Actions runner.
